name: mostSetFBlockID, mostSetFunctionID, mostSetOpType
title: mostSetFBlockID, mostSetFunctionID, mostSetOpType
tables: Deprecated Function The following functions are deprecated! Please use the mostMessage and mostAMSMessage selectors FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType instead.
Set the FBlockID, FunctionID or OpType of the message. Note Since the FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType are part of the message ID these functions change the ID as well.
Note Since the FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType are part of the message ID these functions change the ID as well.
Note Since the FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType are part of the message ID these functions change the ID as well.
msg Variable of type mostMessage or mostAMSMessage. value Value to be set for FBlockID, FunctionID or OpType.
